eligibility.label: Minimum CLB 7 in English or French
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Language proficiency does not meet the minimum CLB 7 requirement

eligibility.label: Must have a post-secondary degree from a Saskatchewan institution

eligibility.label: Must have an operating business in Saskatchewan
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Must have an operating business in Saskatchewan
